{{Quote|Yavin. Krylon. Torque. A ''jillion'' more. Rumor has it Tagge is on to a big ''spice strike'' on one of 'em.|[[Jorman Thoad]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 25">[[Star Wars (1977) 25|''Star Wars'' (1977) 25]]</ref>}}
'''Krylon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]]. It was the dominant planet of the [[Pinooran Spur/Legends|Pinooran Spur]], a polluted, [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]] dominated by [[Hynah|Hynese]] companies, however it was not very important in this region of space.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
